name: Apricot Almond Quickbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C). If the almonds are not already toasted, spread them on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F (180°C) for 5 to 10 minutes or until light brown.
2. Chop dried apricots. The easiest way is to cut them with scissors. Place apricot pieces in a bowl and cover with boiling water. Allow them to rest for 10 minutes while preparing the batter.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and sugar. Stir together well. Add almonds and stir until mixed.
4. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, melted butter, almond extract, and vanilla extract. Pour wet ingredients over dry mixture and stir only until blended.
5. Drain apricots and pat dry with paper towels. Fold in the drained apricots. Spoon batter into a greased 8-inch x 4-inch (1.5-L) loaf pan. Bake for 60 minutes. Allow loaf to rest in pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto wire rack to cool.
Makes one 9-inch x 5-inch (2 L) loaf.
